Video.summary: We tear down Project Spartan to rebuild it, but its surprisingly strong engine changes our plans.
Video.title: Kaiser Jeep Chaos

Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: We built a stock-looking pump-gas 534 BBC sleeper with big torque and power, swap-ready and dyno-tested.
Video.title: Sleeper 534 Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: This Small Block Ford receives big power upgrades.
Video.title: 410ci Stroker Windsor

Video.summary: We’re expecting great numbers in the dyno cell for the 410ci Small Block Ford.
Video.title: Stroker Windsor Dyno Test

Video.summary: We dust off our Test Sled from the pits of darkness and give it a new life.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 1

Video.summary: Our Test Sled has been rejuvenated with a new engine & transmission.
Video.title: Test Sled Reincarnated Stage 2

Video.summary: Out of the shop and into the yard! We take a weekend to rebuild a 350ci small block Chevy V8.
Video.title: Backyard Engine Build

Video.summary: We take the 350ci Small Block Chevy built in the parking lot and upgrade short block assembly.
Video.title: Backyard Build Upgrades

Video.summary: We finish our 350 Small Block Chevy with high-performance induction, then put it to the test.
Video.title: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Image.alt: Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build
Dyno Testing the Upgraded Backyard Build

Video.summary: Carcass gives you tips on how to repair rusty trouble spots and remove dents on your project.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech

Video.summary: We head out to the junkyard to source a drivetrain for the 1996 Chevy Silverado.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh

Video.summary: The Silverado gets buttoned up underneath the hood with cooling and power steering installations.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust

Video.summary: Our '96 Chevy Silverado gets new body parts plus we’ll prep it for paint.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again

Video.summary: The Abandoned Chevy Silverado project is back for mild performance upgrades to the engine.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power

Video.summary: We bring a 96' Chevy Tahoe into the shop and show you what to look for when buying a project.
Video.title: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance

Image.alt: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance

Video.summary: While freshening up the brakes on our ’96 Chevy Tahoe, we noticed that we have a sloppy rear end.
Video.title: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End

Image.alt: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End

Video.summary: We crew bring in a road worn 1996 4X4 Tahoe with plans to convert it into the two wheel drive version.
Video.title: Revamped Tahoe Part 1

Video.summary: Our 1996 Chevy Tahoe continues its conversion with exterior improvements and new wheels and tires.
Video.title: Revamped Tahoe Part 2

Video.summary: What do you get when you combine a Bug and a UTV? The answer: BajAwesome.
Video.title: Beetle to BajAwesome

Video.summary: We add a custom fit roll cage, fabricated louvers, and a bunch of style points to this baja style bug.
Video.title: Baja Makeover

Video.summary: Baja Style bug gets a 80's retro style paint job to go along with a long travel suspension.
Video.title: Retro Baja Bug

Video.summary: The first of a 3 stage build of the durable small block Chevy.
Video.title: In House Power Mouse: Stage I

Image.alt: In House Power Mouse: Stage I
In House Power Mouse: Stage I
In House Power Mouse: Stage I

Video.summary: Stage II of our small block Chevy build gets block modifications.
Video.title: In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Image.alt: In House Power Mouse: Stage II
In House Power Mouse: Stage II
In House Power Mouse: Stage II

Video.summary: Pat and Mike button up their Gen III Hemi with super trick heads, then it's tech tip time with Mike and Pat.
Video.title: Hemi Top End Magic

Video.summary: In Stage 3 of our small-block build, our 383 becomes a 406.
Video.title: In-House Power Mouse Roars

Video.summary: How-to build a modern Chevy stroker starting from scratch with an LQ4 iron truck block.
Video.title: Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker

Image.alt: Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker
Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker
Iron Animal Part 1: Building a 408 Stroker

Video.summary: The latest GenX cylinder heads are flowed, installed and topped off with multi-port fuel injection
Video.title: Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads

Image.alt: Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads
Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads
Iron Animal Part 2: Flow Bench Testing Heads

Video.summary: How to turbo-charge an iron block LS stroker to make 1000 horsepower.
Video.title: Iron Animal 408: Wicked Turbo Power

Video.summary: Our 1969 Jeep M715 Project Spartan is getting a frame-up overhaul to look like a truck again.
Video.title: Lighting the Way Forward

Video.summary: Our guys are towing the line because it’s all about second chances for a 1977 Chevy C-30 tow truck!
Video.title: Tow Truck

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada faces its toughest test during a full-throttle day at the drag strip.
Video.title: The Sleeper Awakens

Video.summary: We turbocharge a bone stock Big Block Ford on the cheap.
Video.title: Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford
Boosting a Stock 460ci Big Block Ford

Video.summary: We're putting together a high-compression 440ci road race engine for Carcass' 1972 Camaro race car!
Video.title: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I

Image.alt: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part I

Video.summary: We finish the assembly of our 440 with a conventional SBC bottom end and LS induction.
Video.title: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II

Image.alt: 440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II
440ci Motown LS Race Engine: Part II

Video.summary: We put custom touches on our 496ci Stroker Big Block and get it ready for the street rod life!
Video.title: 496ci Stroker Big Block Chevy

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie upgrade internal components to make our blue oval beast more durable under boost.
Video.title: Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford

Image.alt: Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford
Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford
Beefing Up Our 460 Big Block Ford

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: Today our guys are taking some liberties transforming a Jeep Wagoneer into a S-U-V performance beast!
Video.title: TrashHawk

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck and turn it into a time crunching beast on the track.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy

Video.summary: Our 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck gets a new heartbeat.
Video.title: Pro Touring Power

Video.summary: We work on the suspension of a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck.
Video.title: Track Hugging Chevy

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 and fabricate truck bed to fit our new custom Oval track rear suspension.
Video.title: Pro Touring Paint

Video.summary: We add the final touches to our OBS Pro Touring Chevy C1500 and take it to the C10 Nationals.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy - Track Approved

Video.summary: We bring in a Datsun 280Z and take a look at how it handles on the road.
Video.title: Datsun 280Z Heritage Build Part 1

Video.summary: We start tearing into the powertrain of our Datsun 280Z.
Video.title: Datsun 280Z Heritage Build Part 2

Video.summary: We upgrade our 280Z's suspension to give it better handling.
Video.title: Datsun 280Z Heritage Build Part 3

Video.summary: The Carcass crew makes body modifications to our 1978 280Z that take on some JDM styling cues
Video.title: Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Body Mods and Paint

Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Body Mods and Paint
Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Body Mods and Paint

Video.summary: We put the last few pieces on our 1978 Datsun 280Z project, adding exhaust and fuel injection.
